nav_view_only_title: You have read-only access to this company.
settings_scheduling_hours_rest: asks for hours/day across a start and end date.
settings_scheduling_days_rest: asks for a start, days of work, and days over — the end date follows from how thinly the work is spread.
settings_scheduling_blocks_rest: asks only for a start and days over — a pure booking with no load, so utilisation is ignored.
settings_calendar_intro: Applies to the whole team — sets which day starts the week and the time zone used to determine "today".
settings_calendar_frozen_hint: Set when the company was created and can't be changed.
settings_disciplines_intro: Group people by discipline across the app. Turn this off if your team doesn't use disciplines — they're then hidden from the schedule, resource form and navigation. Your existing discipline data is kept and reappears if you turn it back on.
settings_schedule_intro: How the week grid is drawn — applies to this browser. Minimise weekends shrinks the Saturday and Sunday columns so the working week dominates the view. Weekend work still shows; the columns just narrow. Snap to week start keeps the first day of the week pinned to the left edge so a stray scroll doesn't nudge the view onto a mid-week day.
settings_placeholders_intro: Placeholders are unfilled "slots" you can pencil in before a person is assigned — set per company. Off by default; when off they're hidden everywhere (the schedule, the assignee picker and the Resources list) but their data is kept.
settings_external_intro: Set per company. Off by default; when off externals are hidden everywhere (the schedule, the assignee picker and the Resources list) but their data is kept.
settings_bar_labels_intro: What each bar on the schedule shows before the activity name — applies to this browser.
settings_utilisation_intro: Which utilisation figures appear on the scheduler.
settings_appearance_intro: Theme — applies to this browser. “Match system” follows your operating system.
settings_members_intro: Manage who can access this company. Invite people, change a member's role, or remove them.
scheduler_show_unallocated_title: Show resources with no work on this filter (dimmed) so you can staff them
scheduler_sr_overbooked_two_weeks: Overbooked in the next two weeks.
scheduler_row_dimmed_title: No work on this project — available to staff (drag work onto this row)
scheduler_util_title_oversoon: Overbooked within the next {days} days — utilisation shown over the visible {span}
scheduler_empty_filtered_desc: Try a different search, or clear the filters to bring everyone back into view.
scheduler_empty_filtered_title: No resources match the current filters.
scheduler_empty_desc: Add people on the Resources page, then click or drag on a row to schedule their work.
scheduler_bar_aria_editor: {label}, {hours}{status}, {start} to {end}. Enter to edit; arrow keys to move, Shift+arrow to resize the end, Alt+arrow to resize the start; drag to another row to reassign.
scheduler_bar_pop_footer: Drag to move · edges to resize · drop on another row to reassign
form_allocation_placeholder_locked: Placeholder — locked to its bound project.
form_allocation_advisory: This allocation is {advisory}. Saving is still allowed.
form_allocation_err_dates_required: Start and end dates are required.
form_allocation_err_end_before_start: End date cannot be before the start date.
form_allocation_err_days_of_work_gt_zero: Days of work must be greater than 0.
form_allocation_err_hours_gt_zero: Hours per day must be greater than 0.
form_allocation_err_days_over_max: That’s more than {max}h a day. Increase “Days over” or reduce “Days of work”.
form_allocation_err_new_activity_name: Enter a name for the new activity.
form_timeoff_err_dates_required: Start and end dates are required.
form_timeoff_err_end_before_start: End date cannot be before the start date.
form_timeoff_err_save_failed: Could not save this time off.
form_resource_err_name_required: Name is required for a person.
form_resource_err_placeholder_project: A placeholder must be bound to a project.
form_resource_err_hours_gt_zero: Working hours per day must be greater than 0.
form_activity_err_project_required: A project activity must be assigned to a project.
dialog_delete_company_body_suffix: and all of its data (resources, projects, allocations…)? This cannot be undone.
dialog_delete_company_export_failed_suff: Your data was not exported — do not delete until you have a backup.
dialog_delete_company_hint: Type the company name exactly to enable Delete.
list_resources_empty_desc: Resources are the people you schedule work for.
list_resources_external_empty_desc: External parties are third-party suppliers you book without tracking their capacity.
list_resources_delete_message: Delete "{name}" and all of their allocations and time off? You can undo this with ⌘Z.
list_resources_external_delete_message: Delete "{name}" and all of its allocations? You can undo this with ⌘Z.
list_clients_empty_desc: Clients are the companies your team does work for.
list_clients_delete_message: Delete "{name}" and all of its projects, phases, activities and allocations? You can undo this with ⌘Z.
list_projects_empty_desc: Projects belong to a client and hold the activities you schedule.
list_projects_delete_message: Delete "{name}" with its phases, activities and allocations? Placeholders bound to it will be unbound. You can undo this with ⌘Z.
list_activities_empty_desc: Activities are the work you allocate — project, internal or repeatable.
list_activities_delete_message: Delete "{name}" and any allocations of it?
list_disciplines_empty_desc: Disciplines group your people and give them a colour on the schedule.
list_disciplines_delete_message: Delete "{name}"? Resources in it will be ungrouped (not deleted).
list_timeoff_empty_desc: Book holidays and other time away so the schedule shows real availability.
settings_members_copy_failed: Could not copy — select and copy the link manually.
settings_archived_intro: Resources, clients and projects you have archived or deleted. Restore an archived item, or delete it to start the 30-day countdown to permanent removal.
settings_archived_delete_message: Delete "{name}"? This anonymises any personal data and starts a 30-day countdown to permanent removal. Restore is only available from an archived item, so delete only when you are sure.
settings_archived_purge_locked_hint: Can be permanently deleted 30 days after deletion
settings_archived_purge_message: Permanently delete "{name}" and everything under it? This cannot be undone.
settings_archived_err_action: That action could not be completed ({status}).
list_resources_archive_message: Archive "{name}"? They will be hidden from the schedule. You can restore them or permanently delete them from Settings → Archived & deleted.
list_clients_archive_message: Archive "{name}"? Its projects and work will be hidden from the schedule. You can restore it or permanently delete it from Settings → Archived & deleted.
list_projects_archive_message: Archive "{name}"? It will be hidden from the schedule. You can restore it or permanently delete it from Settings → Archived & deleted.
scheduler_toast_move_rejected: That allocation could not be moved there.
scheduler_toast_capped: Work volume was capped at {max}h/day. Press ⌘Z to undo.
settings_clear_desc_server: Clears the {app} data and settings cached in this browser. Your account data lives in the database and is safe — the app reloads from there. This cannot be undone for this browser.
settings_clear_desc_local: Permanently clears the {app} data and settings stored in this browser. In local mode this is your only copy, so this erases your data. This cannot be undone.
settings_clear_confirm_server: This permanently clears the {app} data and settings stored in THIS browser, and cannot be undone. On this hosted site your data lives in the database and is safe — the app will reload and re-load it from there.
settings_clear_confirm_local: This permanently clears the {app} data and settings stored in THIS browser, and cannot be undone. In local mode this is your only copy, so this erases your local data.
dialog_unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes — use Cancel or Save to close this dialog.
app_persist_error: Changes aren’t being saved right now — we’ll keep retrying.
data_err_too_large: That file is too large to import (max {max}MB).
data_err_invalid_json: Could not import that file — it is not valid {app} JSON.
login_network_error: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
picker_subtitle: Pick a company to plan, or create a new one.
picker_empty: No companies yet — create your first one, or ask an admin for an invite.
conn_body: {app} couldn’t load your data — the server is unavailable or your connection is down. Your saved data is safe on the server; nothing has been changed. Check your connection and try again.
storage_title: Stored data could not be read
storage_body: Your saved {app} data is present but unreadable, so it hasn’t been loaded. To protect it, nothing has been saved over it. Download a raw copy to keep (you can try to repair it), then reset to start fresh. After resetting you can import a backup from the Data menu.
storage_download_error: Couldn’t read the stored bytes — your browser may be blocking storage access. Check its storage/privacy settings and try again.
storage_reset_confirm_message: This permanently discards the unreadable data and starts {app} fresh. Download a raw copy first if you might want to recover it.
rotate_body: {app} is a week-at-a-glance schedule — turn your phone sideways to see the full picture.
invite_err_used: This invite has already been used.
invite_err_signin: Please sign in to accept this invite.
invite_err_generic: Could not accept this invite. Please try again.
invite_err_missing_token: This invite link is missing its token.
invite_err_network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
invite_local_mode: Invite links work only when {app} is connected to a server.
intro_p1_after: — it helps you see who's working on what, and who has capacity.
intro_p2_after: . It won't track tasks, tickets, or deadlines for you. It answers a simpler question: where are your people's hours going, and where is there room?
intro_p3: Keep it light. Plan your people, not your paperwork.
notice_viewer_read_only: Read-only — you don't have edit access.
notice_purge_grace_window: This can only be permanently deleted 30 days after deletion.
